_doc: Per-project coverage thresholds — single source of truth ([COVERAGE-THRESHOLDS-JSON]). Each entry is a project directory; `make test` measures that project and fails hard below its threshold. Thresholds are monotonically increasing: when coverage improves, bump the number to (measured - 1) in the same PR. Aim is 90% for every project; see docs/plans/coverage-to-90-percent.md.
